subcodes.first_line: The handmaid of God, Miss Barney, had asked a question as to the wisdom of burying the dead in the earth.
subcodes.first_line_orig: امه الله مس بارنی سوال از حکمت دفن اموات در تراب نموده بود و نیز گفته بود که
subcodes.subjects: @law of burial and cremation, @interconnectedness; all things involved in all things; chain of being, @progress only takes place within its own degree
